{# activity_tab.html — Vendor Activity tab: type-sectioned + date-grouped feed. Sections: Calls · Emails · Meetings · Notes · Other (hidden by default). Within each section activities are date-grouped (Today / Yesterday / %b %d, %Y). Mirrors the account Activity tab (customers/tabs/activity_tab.html) minus the account-only RFQ-contact merge — vendors have no requisition RFQ contacts. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), activities (list[ActivityLog] newest-first), sections (dict[str, list]) — pre-bucketed by route, activities_truncated (bool), has_any_activity (bool). Called by: vendor_tab route (tab=="activity") in htmx_views.py. Depends on: HTMX, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, activity_row/activity_icon macros, now() Jinja global. #} {% from "htmx/partials/shared/_macros.html" import activity_row, activity_icon %} {# ── Section metadata: label, icon type, hidden-by-default flag ── #} {%- set _section_meta = [ ('Calls', 'call_logged', false), ('Emails', 'email_sent', false), ('Meetings', 'meeting', false), ('Notes', 'note', false), ('Other', 'status_changed', true) ] -%}
{# ── Add note button ─────────────────────────────────────────── #}
{# ── Empty state ─────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if not has_any_activity %}

No activity recorded for this vendor yet.

Activity will appear here as you log calls, emails, notes, and meetings.

{% endif %} {# ── Type sections ─────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if has_any_activity %}
{% for section_label, icon_type, is_other in _section_meta %} {%- set section_items = sections[section_label] -%} {% if section_items %} {# Other section is collapsible via Alpine hideOther toggle #} {% if is_other %}
{# ── Section header ───────────────────────────────── #}
{{ activity_icon(icon_type) }}

{{ section_label }}

{{ section_items|length }}
Show
{# ── Section body ─────────────────────────────────── #}
{%- set today = now().date() -%} {%- set ns = namespace(day=None) -%} {% for a in section_items %} {%- set ts = a.occurred_at or a.created_at -%} {% if ts and ts.date() != ns.day %} {%- set ns.day = ts.date() -%} {%- set day_delta = (today - ts.date()).days -%}

{%- if day_delta == 0 %}Today {%- elif day_delta == 1 %}Yesterday {%- else %}{{ ts.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }}{% endif -%}

{% endif %} {{ activity_row(a) }} {% endfor %}
{% else %} {# ── Normal (visible) section ──────────────────────── #}
{# ── Section header ───────────────────────────────── #}
{{ activity_icon(icon_type) }}

{{ section_label }}

{{ section_items|length }}
{# ── Section body (date-grouped) ───────────────────── #}
{%- set today = now().date() -%} {%- set ns = namespace(day=None) -%} {% for a in section_items %} {%- set ts = a.occurred_at or a.created_at -%} {% if ts and ts.date() != ns.day %} {%- set ns.day = ts.date() -%} {%- set day_delta = (today - ts.date()).days -%}

{%- if day_delta == 0 %}Today {%- elif day_delta == 1 %}Yesterday {%- else %}{{ ts.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }}{% endif -%}

{% endif %} {{ activity_row(a) }} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {# ── Truncation footer ─────────────────────────────── #} {% if activities_truncated %}

Showing most recent 50 activities — older history may not appear.

{% endif %}
{% endif %}
